What stage is my application at? I applied two weeks ago and haven't heard back yet.
Can I reschedule my interview from Thursday to Friday? I have a conflict with a doctor's appointment.
I'd like to withdraw my application for the Senior Engineer role. I've accepted another offer. Thank you for your consideration.
Why was I rejected? I believe I meet all the listed requirements. Can you share the specific areas where my qualifications fell short?
Do you offer relocation assistance for the position in San Francisco? I'm currently based in New York.
What is the salary range for this position? The job listing didn't include compensation details.
I just wanted to follow up on my technical assessment. When can I expect to hear the results?
Can you tell me more about the team I'd be working with? What's the engineering culture like?
I noticed a typo in my resume that I submitted. Is it possible to upload a corrected version?
What are the next steps after the phone screen? How many interview rounds should I expect?
I have 5 years of experience in the exact tech stack mentioned. Should I also include my open-source contributions?
Is this role fully remote or hybrid? The listing mentioned flexible work arrangements but wasn't specific.
Thank you for the offer! I'd like to negotiate the base salary. Is there flexibility in the compensation package?
I have a disability accommodation request for the interview. Can we arrange for a sign language interpreter?
I submitted my application through your system but the confirmation email never arrived. Can you verify my application was received?
Are there any other open positions similar to this one? I'm also interested in backend engineering roles.
My interviewer mentioned they'd send me a coding challenge link. I haven't received it yet. Can you resend it?
I need to update my availability for next week. I'm free Monday through Wednesday, any time after 2pm EST.
Does the company offer sponsorship for H-1B visas? This is important for my application decision.
I really enjoyed the conversation with the hiring manager. The prompt engineering focus of the role aligns perfectly with my background.
